title: Leitstand ecosystem visualization layer expansion
goal: Expand Leitstand into a read-only visualization layer for ecosystem maps, source freshness, RepoBrief health, and cross-view navigation without making Leitstand a source of truth, orchestrator, or task dispatcher.
completion: Cabinet exposes a stable ecosystem map artifact contract for Leitstand to consume.
Leitstand has a read-only /ecosystem-map view with source identity, freshness, boundary language, and safe empty states.
Rendered map display is introduced without making Leitstand the map authority.
Cross-view links use deterministic IDs and degraded labels for unknown mappings.
RepoBrief/rLens bundle observability is visible in Leitstand with export-safety and freshness warnings.
An internal pilot records missing, stale, and degraded source behavior without adding write paths.

evidence_anchor.preflight_warning: claim-evidence sidecars skipped; no missing required artifacts

metadata.initial_task_policy: Do not put this initiative in the active queue until current Bureau runtime/hardening work is reconciled.

lifecycle_reconcile.reason: activated as a registered later-work visualization initiative
